findings.title: The writer runs after every search fails
findings.demonstratedImpact: When every deterministic search boundary returns failure, the real manager passes an empty result set to the writer and emits its report instead of stopping.
findings.limitation: This does not show that a real model fabricates facts, how often search fails in production, or the quality of any financial report.

findings.title: The manager emits a report after verification retry exhaustion
findings.demonstratedImpact: When the verifier remains negative on the initial report and both permitted revisions, the real manager prints that report and the negative verification object as terminal output.
findings.limitation: This does not establish that real verifier decisions are correct, that users treat console output as approved advice, or any production incidence.
